\tzpentry{ID5653}{Ensemble Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5653 introduces Ensemble Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R(r,t)\rightarrow 0 \quad \text{as}\quad t\rightarrow \infty \quad \text{(in ensemble average)}. \end{equation}
